case_title: TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION VS. SCOTT BOWMAN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-08-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT SCOTT BOWMAN [CCP 664.6]; MEMO OF P&A; AND DECLARATION OF TODD F. HAINES IN SUPPORT THEREOF; [PROPOSED] JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT SCOTT BOWMAN [CCP 664.6] IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 17, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO GIVE NOTICE TO OPPOSING COUNSEL. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF PROVIDES COURTESY COPIES TO COURTROOM CLERK PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND ENTER JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT SCOTT BOWMAN [CCP 664.6] IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL ENTER JUDGMENT IN THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $1200, PLUS INTEREST OF $433.59, AND COSTS AS MAY BE PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW. COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE COSTS AT THIS TIME. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Deft Scott Bowman [Ccp 664.6]; Memo Of P&A; And Declaration Of Todd F. Haines In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Defendant Scott Bowman [CCP 664.6] is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will enter judgment in the principal sum of $1200, plus interest of $433.59, and costs as may be permitted by applicable law. Court will not determine costs at this time. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Deft Scott Bowman [Ccp 664.6]; Memo Of P&A; And Declaration Of Todd F. Haines In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-14-2012 Continued To Jan-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert F. Cohen, Esq., 800.492.2657, for plainitff Topa Insurance Company; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. At conclusion of discussion, The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION'S Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Defendant Scott Bowman [CCP 664.6] is continued to January 17, 2013. Counsel for the plaintiff is ordered to give notice to opposing counsel. Counsel for plaintiff provides courtesy copies to courtroom clerk pursuant to Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward #7077.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Deft Scott Bowman [Ccp 664.6]; Memo Of P&A; And Declaration Of Todd F. Haines In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Continued To Dec-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TOPA INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Enforce Settlement And Enter Judgment Against Defendant Scott Bowman [C.C.P. 664.6] is continued to December 14 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date no later than 4pm December 6. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Off Calendar
